title: Be Good to Others
content: “Worship Allah and associate nothing with Him, and do good to parents, relatives, orphans…” (Qur’an 4:36)

title: Mind Your Speech
content: “And speak to people good [words].” (Qur’an 2:83)

title: Restrain Anger
content: “And those who restrain anger…” (Qur’an 3:134)

title: Lower Your Voice
content: “And lower your voice; indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys.” (Qur’an 31:19)

title: Forgive Others
content: “And forgive others for their mistakes.” (Qur’an 7:199)

title: Be Just
content: “O you who have believed, be persistently standing firm in justice…” (Qur’an 4:135)

title: Keep Promises
content: “And fulfill [every] commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever [that about which one will be] questioned.” (Qur’an 17:34)

title: Guard Orphans’ Wealth
content: “And do not consume their wealth into your wealth.” (Qur’an 4:2)

title: Avoid Suspicion
content: “O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption…” (Qur’an 49:12)

title: Do Not Backbite
content: “Nor backbite one another. Would one of you like to eat the flesh of his brother…” (Qur’an 49:12)

title: Spend in Charity
content: “And establish prayer and give zakāh…” (Qur’an 2:43)

title: Feed the Needy
content: “And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy…” (Qur’an 76:8)

title: Avoid Extravagance
content: “Eat and drink, but be not excessive.” (Qur’an 7:31)

title: Respect Guests
content: “And they are those who, when We give them power in the land, establish regular prayer and give zakah and enjoin what is right…” (Qur’an 22:41)

title: Speak Mildly
content: “And speak to people mild [words].” (Qur’an 20:44)

title: Show Gratitude
content: “If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor].” (Qur’an 14:7)

title: Remember Allah Often
content: “O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance.” (Qur’an 33:41)

title: Patience is Rewarded
content: “Indeed, Allah is with the patient.” (Qur’an 2:153)

title: Seek Forgiveness
content: “And those who repent…” (Qur’an 49:11)

title: Speak Good or Remain Silent
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him speak goodness or remain silent.” (Bukhari)

title: Smiling is Charity
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Smiling in the face of your brother is charity.” (Tirmidhi)

title: Patience in Hardship
content: “O believers, seek help through patience and prayer…” (Qur’an 2:45)

title: Repel Evil with Good
content: “Repel [evil] by that [deed] which is better…” (Qur’an 23:96)

title: Avoid Bribery
content: “And do not consume one another’s wealth through falsehood.” (Qur’an 4:29)

title: Speak Truthfully
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Truth leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise…” (Bukhari & Muslim)

title: Treat Parents Kindly
content: “And your Lord has decreed that you not worship except Him, and to parents, good treatment.” (Qur’an 17:23)

title: Be Just Even Against Yourself
content: “O you who have believed, be persistently standing firm in justice…” (Qur’an 4:135)

title: Seek Refuge from Shayṭān
content: “And say, ‘My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils.’” (Qur’an 23:97)

title: Lower the Gaze
content: “Tell the believing men to reduce [some] of their vision…” (Qur’an 24:30)

title: Guard Chastity
content: “And those who guard their private parts.” (Qur’an 23:5)

title: Keep Promises
content: “And fulfill every commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever [that about which one will be] questioned.” (Qur’an 17:34)

title: Do Not Consume Interest
content: “O you who have believed, do not consume interest…” (Qur’an 3:130)

title: Be Forgiving
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “The merciful are shown mercy by The Most Merciful…” (Tirmidhi)

title: Bring People Together
content: “And hold firmly to the rope of Allah all together…” (Qur’an 3:103)

title: Avoid Conflict
content: “And do not argue and call each other by [offensive] nicknames…” (Qur’an 49:11)

title: Help Those in Need
content: “And worship Allah and associate nothing with Him and to parents do good, and to relatives, orphans…” (Qur’an 4:36)

title: Be Grateful
content: “If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor]…” (Qur’an 14:7)

title: Place Trust in Allah
content: “And whoever relies upon Allah – then He is sufficient for him.” (Qur’an 65:3)

title: Avoid Gossip
content: “O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption…” (Qur’an 49:12)

title: Stop Rash Judgments
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Beware of suspicion for suspicion is the worst of false tales.” (Bukhari & Muslim)

title: Be Mindful of Allah
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Be mindful of Allah, and He will protect you. Be mindful of Him…” (Tirmidhi)

title: Charity Erases Sins
content: “Take, [O Muhammad], from their wealth a charity by which you purify them…” (Qur’an 9:103)

title: Lower Your Voice
content: “And lower your voice. Indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys.” (Qur’an 31:19)

title: Live Moderately
content: “Eat and drink but be not excessive.” (Qur’an 7:31)

title: Stand Firm for Justice
content: “O you who have believed, be persistently standing firm for Allah, witnesses in justice…” (Qur’an 4:135)

title: Be Patient in Adversity
content: “And certainly, We will test you with something of fear and hunger…” (Qur’an 2:155)

title: Seek Knowledge
content: “Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave.” (Hadith)

title: Speak Good or Stay Silent
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him speak good or remain silent.” (Bukhari)

title: Greet With Peace
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Spread peace between yourselves.” (Muslim)

title: Visit the Sick
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Whoever visits a sick person…” (Bukhari)

title: Be Honest in Trade
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “The honest merchant will be with the Prophets…” (Tirmidhi)

title: Love for Others What You Love for Yourself
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “None of you will have faith until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.” (Bukhari)

title: Control Anger
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “The strong is not the one who overcomes people by his strength, but the strong is the one who controls himself while in anger.” (Bukhari)

title: Help Your Brothers
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Whoever relieves a believer’s distress…” (Muslim)

title: Show Humility
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “He who humbles himself for the sake of Allah, Allah will raise him in status.” (Muslim)

title: Perform Ablution Well
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Allah loves that when one of you performs ablution, he does it well.” (Muslim)

title: Cleanliness is Half of Faith
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Cleanliness is half of faith.” (Muslim)

title: Lower Your Gaze
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Tell the believing men to lower their gaze…” (Qur’an 24:30)

title: Maintain Ties of Kinship
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Whoever would like his provision to be increased and his life span extended, let him uphold the ties of kinship.” (Bukhari)

title: Moderation in Spending
content: “And let not your hands be tied [like a miser]...” (Qur’an 17:29)

title: Trust Allah Alone
content: ‘...and upon Allah let the believers rely.’ (Qur’an 14:11)

title: Repel Evil by Good
content: “Repel evil with that which is best…” (Qur’an 23:96)

title: Be Content
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Richness is not having many possessions, but richness is the richness of the soul.” (Bukhari)

title: Remember Death
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Remember often the destroyer of pleasures (i.e. death).” (Tirmidhi)

title: Be Kind to Neighbors
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Jibril continued to advise me to be good to neighbors…” (Bukhari)

title: Feed the Muslim Poor
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Whoever feeds a fasting person will have a reward like theirs…” (Tirmidhi)

title: Do Good Deeds
content: “And whoever does righteous deeds, whether male or female…” (Qur’an 4:124)

title: Keep Your Tongue Moist with Dhikr
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Keep your tongue moist with the remembrance of Allah.” (Ibn Majah)

title: Give Sincere Advice
content: Prophet ﷺ said: “Religion is sincere advice…” (Muslim)

title: Trust in Allah's Plan
content: “And whoever relies upon Allah – then He is sufficient for him.” (Qur’an 65:3)
